falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,600 on any single day within the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 78% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug is broken; a new high would invalidate the bottoming pattern and suggest the 'HOLD' signal was wrong—this was likely a distribution top, not a bottom formation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.00 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 39 implies elevated volatility/uncertainty; sustained VIX compression below 12 would indicate complacency and risk-on normalization, proving the macro engine misread the regime as fragile rather than stable

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and holds there for 5+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-quality bid of that magnitude would signal recession/de-risking, contradicting the bottom_2024_aug pattern (which occurred during soft-landing pricing); the 'HOLD' call would be wrong as it failed to anticipate the macro pivot

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
